title: Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep? (Oxford Bookworms Adaptation)
author: Philip K. Dick (adapted by Andy Hopkins and Joc Potter)
card_summary: An adapted/simplified version of Dick's classic novel for the Oxford Bookworms Library (Stage 5, advanced level). Adapted by Andy Hopkins and Joc Potter for English language learners, published by Oxford University Press in 2007. Demonstrates the global educational reach of Dick's most famous novel. 183 pages.
